action.reasoning: Observation: Baseline 0.8084 bal_acc with 5 epochs ConvNeXt-Tiny at 224. Many-shot 0.89, few-shot 0.71. Analysis: Few-shot classes underperform — need better imbalance handling. Strategies: (1) longer training, (2) two-stage training (CE then CB-loss/cRT), (3) MixUp/CutMix, (4) larger backbone like CLIP ViT-B/16 might help. Time: 80s for 5 epochs ≈ 16s/epoch. With ~2.9h budget, can afford ~30 epochs ConvNeXt or try CLIP. Decision: Try a stronger run — 20 epochs with mixup, two-stage approach: stage 1 standard CE for representations, stage 2 fine-tune classifier with class-balanced loss. Also use deferred re-weighting (DRW). Actually simpler: just train longer with better augmentation and DRW (apply class weights only after epoch 60% in).
